protocol_override: User approved Codex/GPT self-judge instead of Gemini API.

parsed.signature_a: A computes the minimum value, given a non-empty list of integers, producing an integer.
parsed.signature_b: B computes an integer ratio, given a numerator and positive divisor, producing an integer.

same_problem.why: The programs compute different outputs or solve different requested tasks.

same_domain.why: Both operate on shared domain(s): refinements.
